personalInfo.name: Faraz Ahmed
personalInfo.bio: I craft highly interactive, performant, and beautifully designed web experiences. Specialized in React, Node.js, and modern cloud infrastructures, with a passion for fluid animations and user-centric interfaces.

projects.title: Aura Stream Dashboard
projects.description: A real-time analytical dashboard for streaming analytics, integrated with WebSockets, interactive charts, and live chat moderation tools.

projects.title: Quantum Board
projects.description: A cyberpunk-themed productivity visual board featuring keyboard shortcuts, indexedDB offline caching, and responsive flow lines.

projects.title: Nova 3D Shop
projects.description: An e-commerce landing page boasting dynamic webgl-based three-dimensional displays, filtering systems, and Stripe checkout integration.

projects.title: Synaptic Synth
projects.description: An interactive Web Audio sequencer and modular audio visualizer running natively in the browser with customizable synthesizer patterns.
